GT LEARN #73 🎯 Set Matrix Zeroes MEDIUM Matrix Hash Set
matrix= exp: [[1,0,1],[0,0,0],[1,0,1]]

📝 Problem Statement

Given an m × n matrix, if any element is 0, set its entire row and entire column to 0. Modify the matrix in-place.

🧠 Solving Approach (Hash Set — O(m+n) space)

Two-pass algorithm: Pass 1 — scan every cell, record rows & columns that contain a 0 in two sets. Pass 2 — re-scan and zero out any cell whose row OR column is flagged.

🎯 Core Concepts

Why two passes? Single pass would over-zero — every 0 would cascade falsely. Sets: zero_rows + zero_cols — track only flagged indices, not values. In-place: mutate matrix[i][j] directly during pass 2.
⏱️ Time: O(m·n) 💾 Space: O(m+n)

🧪 Test Cases

—
📜 Python Code
